backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a simple inquiry management system with CRUD operations (submit, delete, get, filter by email) storing inquiries in a map with timestamp ordering.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the Location component was updated to display named studio entries (Studio Belvedere, Clinicus Natura, and an unlabelled off-location entry) with studio names above addresses.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON file containing 1–2 sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's component and style structure.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the app into a div#root and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component composing the full single-page layout with Hero, Practice, Foundations, Location, Confidentiality, Contact, About, Footer sections, and a toast notifier.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: Two-column About section displaying a portrait image alongside biographical text describing Aiko Herzig's fifteen-year integrative practice.
Minimal section displaying a single centered statement: 'Discretion is absolute.'
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Centered contact section listing referral-based inquiry instructions, email, and phone number with fade-in animation.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer with copyright notice, email, and phone number in a centered vertical layout.
frontend/src/components/Foundations.tsx: Centered text section describing the evidence-informed methodology integrating naturopathic principles, acupressure, and post-clinical continuity of care.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with layered background images, displaying the title 'Aiko Herzig', service categories, and a referral notice in centered serif typography.
frontend/src/components/Location.tsx: Two-column Location section listing Studio Belvedere (Vienna) and Clinicus Natura (Braga) with studio names above addresses, plus an unlabelled off-location/Zoom entry, alongside a studio image.
frontend/src/components/Practice.tsx: Centered Practice section describing the one-to-one adaptive training approach with emphasis on precision, continuity, and long-term progress.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, handling both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) sessions and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for submitting, fetching, and deleting inquiries via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file setting up Tailwind directives, OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and typography styles using Cormorant Garamond and Inter fonts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence and hash cleanup helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH color tokens, custom border radii, animations, font families, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features and a pending request to update the Locations section with named studio entries (Studio Belvedere, Clinicus Natura, and an off-location note).
